ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hrv_data" (
  "hrv_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HRV data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point in milliseconds */,
  "hr" REAL /* Heart rate (HR) in beats per minute (bpm) */,
  "avnn" REAL /* Average normal-to-normal interval (AVNN) in milliseconds */,
  "sdnn" REAL /* Standard deviation of normal-to-normal interval (SDNN) in milliseconds */,
  "rmssd" REAL /* Root mean square of successive differences (rMSSD) in milliseconds */,
  "pnn50" REAL /* Percentage of successive normal-to-normal intervals > 50 ms (pNN50) in percentage */,
  "lf" REAL /* Power spectral density (PSD) in low frequency (LF) band */,
  "hf" REAL /* Power spectral density (PSD) in high frequency (HF) band */,
  "lfhf" REAL /* Ratio of LF to HF */,
  "alpha_1" REAL /* Alpha 1 value */,
  "artifacts_removed" INTEGER /* Number of artifacts removed */,
  "source_device" TEXT /* Type of device used to collect the data */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data */,
  "sampling_rate" INTEGER /* Sampling rate of the data in Hz */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Qualitative assessment of the data */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hrv_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name given to the dataset by the user */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Qualitative assessment of the dataset */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure file integrity */,
  "encryption_status" TEXT /* Encryption status of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hrv_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "hrv_metrics" TEXT /* HRV metrics calculated for the dataset */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "parameters_used" TEXT /* Parameters used in the analysis */,
  "analysis_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the analysis in seconds */,
  "results_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analysis results */,
  "result_quality" TEXT /* Qualitative assessment of the analysis results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hrv_analysis_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artifact_removal" (
  "artifact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artifact removal */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being processed */,
  "technique" TEXT /* Name of the artifact removal technique used */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the technique */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the artifact removal */,
  "removal_type" TEXT /* Type of artifact removal */,
  "parameters_used" TEXT /* Parameters used in the artifact removal process */,
  "removal_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the artifact removal process in seconds */,
  "results_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the artifact removal results */,
  "result_quality" TEXT /* Qualitative assessment of the artifact removal results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artifact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artifact_removal_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser or device */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
